none.justification: The answer gives the exact GT count of 70, uses a whole-repo grep scoped to .c files, and explicitly says all matches are under src/ and server.h itself is not counted. Minor file-list oddities do not undermine the count/scope evidence enough to lose credit.

ccodegraph.justification: The answer reports the exact count of 70 and describes graph plus grep/SQL cross-checks. It correctly filters out non-.c includers and gives the expected .c list under src/, matching the GT rubric.

lsp.justification: The answer states 66, which is off by more than 2 from the verified count of 70. Although it claims a whole-repo grep/scope check, the core numeric answer is wrong and misses GT files.
